title: mesosphaerum scabrum
intro: Mesosphaerum scabrum, also known as Plectranthus fruticosus or coleus scabridus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Africa, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Mesosphaerum scabrum include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential use as an antiseptic and antispasmodic agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine in the form of a paste or powder.
